turns.q: Is a damaged item handled differently from a normal return?
turns.replyTail:
ective, incorrect, or has a quality issue, it is handled differently from a standard return. In those cases, a return shipment is not required, and the case is reviewed for a resolution such as a refund or store credit. For standard returns, items are generally accepted within 30 days of delivery, and a refund to the original payment method includes an $8 return shipping fee. You can also review our policy here: https://beekman1802.com/pages/shipping-returns-policy

4:13 AM. You said:

Do you need photos, and where do I send them?

04:13 AM

Yes, for a damaged item we do ask for a photo if possible. Please send a photo of the damage and let us know which product was damaged. If you bought it directly from us, please also share your order number. If you purchased it from another retailer, you will need to contact that retailer for help with the claim.
